name: recall_vm_firewall_maps_sc7
description: RECALL case — expected to FAIL pre-RAG-rewrite. Real eMASS BoE file under 10.SC/: a script(1) capture of `firewall-cmd --list-all` on a VM host. Host-based firewall with default-deny zones enforcing boundary protection is SC-7 (Boundary Protection). Body has NO control ID / CCI / doc number; firewalld vocabulary ('public (active)', 'target: DROP', 'rich rules') has near-zero overlap with 'boundary protection'. Current tagger → zero tags. Distractor AC-4 (information flow) present as precision guard.

objectives.text: The information system monitors and controls communications at the external boundary of the system and at key internal boundaries within the system.
objectives.implementation_guidance: Deploy boundary protection devices configured to deny by default and allow by exception.

objectives.text: The information system enforces approved authorizations for controlling the flow of information within the system and between interconnected systems.

evidence.title: VM host firewall capture
evidence.text:
Script started on 2026-03-09 13:22:00-0500
[root@app01 ~]# firewall-cmd --state
running
[root@app01 ~]# firewall-cmd --list-all
public (active)
  target: DROP
  icmp-block-inversion: no
  interfaces: ens192
  sources:
  services: ssh
  ports: 8443/tcp
  protocols:
  forward: no
  masquerade: no
  rich rules:
    rule family=ipv4 source address=10.0.0.0/24 port port=22 protocol=tcp accept
    rule family=ipv4 source address=0.0.0.0/0 drop
[root@app01 ~]# firewall-cmd --get-default-zone
public
[root@app01 ~]# exit
Script done on 2026-03-09 13:23:10-0500
